title: Update edmfx_entr_detr.jl

body:
@szy21 - on the way to adding 1M in diagEDMF I did a small refactor of the big integral terms. I found it easier to define the helper functions for advection, entrainment, etc, because it was easier to see from which level the information was coming in. 

Lmk if this looks correct to you and if you would be ok to write it this way.
title: Small refactor

body: So that we try to keep all under 45 minutes
